title: The Christmas Doll Opened Her Eyes

issueSummary.excerpt: The doll arrived without a sender.
issueSummary.message: The opening does not immediately ground the viewer in a concrete impossible detail or contradiction.
issueSummary.recommendation: Strengthen the first sentence with a specific action, message, or anomaly.

issueSummary.message: The source contains ambiguous alternatives that can weaken localization fidelity.
issueSummary.recommendation: Choose the source-explicit option or preserve the ambiguity only if it is intentional.

issueSummary.message: The source uses generic exposition that should be made concrete in the optimized English master.
issueSummary.recommendation: Replace abstract narration with specific actions and outcomes.
